scripts.dev: bun run --filter @agent-wiki/wiki build && concurrently "bun run --filter web dev" "bun run --filter mcp dev"
scripts.build: bun run --filter @agent-wiki/wiki build && bun run --filter web build && bun run --filter mcp build
scripts.start: concurrently "bun run --filter web start" "bun run --filter mcp start"
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @agent-wiki/wiki build && bun run --filter web typecheck && bun run --filter mcp typecheck
